horoscope: You're less interested in the material or practical side of your world today, dear Aries, and taking a special interest in the spiritual or emotional dimensions of your life. The world of your imagination, or of art or mystery, holds the most appeal due to transits involving Neptune in your sign today. You may feel driven to share a vision or idea with someone you care about, or to write about your dreams and perceptions. Your finer qualities and inner strength seem to shine through for others to see today. Your warmth and compassion are evident, but your manner is somewhat aloof right now, perhaps because you're often lost in thought. This is a strong time for recommitting to studies or a project that you have left unfinished. You're interacting with imagination and unique flair.

Today is strong for business as well as most things private, emotional, or behind the scenes, dear Taurus. You're inclined to go with the flow and enjoy the process! You may want to act on a deep desire or a dream, and you can be successful at taking action on a private matter. Helping others can be especially satisfying now, too. Because your intuition and imagination are sharper, you might want to flesh out an existing project with fancy flourishes and details. Private time is helpful today, even though you are also very geared to getting work done. If you have a hunch, it's probably correct, particularly if it relates to business and money matters today. Some form of release from recent pressures can come now. You have easy access to your subconscious mind and your inner world today. Patience might even be satisfying now, and you can feel quite dedicated to a particular project.

Your desire for more independence and spontaneity is strong these days, dear Gemini. With the Sun and Mercury in your sign, harmonizing with Neptune, your mind and heart are opening to new possibilities. These transits encourage looking at things and people for their beauty rather than their flaws. Dreams and ideals assume particular importance to you today, and helping others can be rewarding. The more easygoing and likable qualities of your nature are emphasized now, and they draw others to you. You can feel quite supported and positive about your lot in life and where your life is headed. You can give great advice today, or you can inspire or be inspired by friends and connections. You can enjoy a sense of peace today, but also a desire to act on your dreams and ideals, as you are building your faith in these things. With more faith comes more patience, as you have a sense that things will fall into place. As such, reaching your dreams and happiness goals seems far more achievable.

Today's transits encourage relaxation, retreat, and imagination, dear Cancer. The creative side of your projects holds more appeal than usual, and you're particularly good at seeing magic in your pursuits or bringing magic to your ventures. Others may be turning to you for your unique view or creative touch. You might be looking to take action on a dream, a private matter, or a charitable feeling, and you can be quite successful at making the necessary changes. There could be strong support from behind the scenes or from an unexpected source. Warm feelings about a secret or private matter is possible. Your imagination tends to take you to the right places today! Your creativity may be on show in some manner--the special flair that distinguishes you from the crowd is even more noticeable and enhanced. Your head for practical matters is strong, but you're also drawing heavily on wisdom and intuition.

You are in a great position with friends, goals, learning, and connecting today, dear Leo. You're building a deeper faith in your friendships, and it may be that you need to forgive or get over a hump and reconnect with someone before you feel you can truly move forward. You might thoroughly enjoy sharing beliefs and ideas with friends and networks. Today can be very strong for adventure and play. If you want to make a good impression or host a social event, it's a great time to do so. Transits today inspire you to dream and imagine wonderful possibilities. Look for refreshing changes of scenery or activities that promote emotional refreshment for the best results now. Friendships might develop, or you could connect with interesting people and ideas, and you can feel especially attracted to a cause that means something to you.

Today's transits stir your imagination and inspire your faith, dear Virgo, and can renew your motivation to move ahead with your plans. Research and development are highly favored right now. You tend to shine as a leader as well, and you seem to have others' backing for most, if not all, of your goals. As you consider the more imaginative or spiritual side of long-term goals, career projects, or your career path in general, you get a more balanced, well-rounded feeling. There can be much enjoyment in the feelings of dedication you experience now, and a stronger commitment to working through whatever difficulties may come your way. Your hunches are on the mark right now. Others can be quite intrigued by you and drawn to you naturally, particularly at a professional level. Intuition is strong for understanding what the public needs and for anticipating future trends, which helps you make better plans. Channels for self-expression open with increased faith. You might also hear of someone who has put in a good word for you. Interesting turns in your career are likely now.

With Saturn, Neptune, and Chiron in your opposing sign, dear Libra, one-to-one relationships are sometimes complicated, but full of opportunities to grow. Sometimes you're seeing significant others unclearly. Today, your compassion for others is even stronger, and you may have the opportunity to support someone who needs your help, whether mentally, physically, or spiritually. You are likely to receive favorable, positive responses to your ideas or plans. This is also a time for building confidence and excitement about new ideas. You could have a breakthrough of sorts on an intellectual level or about a belief. Opinions can change suddenly as a result, and so can interests, which may be something to watch for now. Take note of ideas and insights as they come in, as they can be quite inspired! Something you learn or a conversation about a philosophical or technical matter can be motivating. Patience and a feeling of connectedness with others can be in focus. Something spiritual, romantic, or otherwise inspiring can lift your spirits and improve your outlook. Feeling on the same page with someone or feeling understood can have the same effect. You may feel renewed by a new perspective on your life today.

Today's transits bring creative flair and a nice touch of imagination to the day, dear Scorpio. They also help you "go with the flow" rather than rush or push things. There can be intuitive hunches that lead you to the right information and creative ways to improve your work or health. Supporting others or self-improvement efforts can be immensely rewarding now. Insights into your work, health, and possibly an intimate relationship can be notable and stand out today. Today's influences highlight the value of your intuition, and putting your faith in a person you care about, and yourself, too, can be just what you need today. Your imagination is in full swing. You are especially receptive to subtle changes and motions, as well as to cycles and connections. Untapped or hidden resources can be yours to discover. A small windfall or support coming in from others can be part of the picture. It's a strong time for making plans to get the most from your work or health projects and programs.

Transits today build your faith that things will unfold as they should, dear Sagittarius, and this can help you relax and open your heart. There can be greater understanding and acceptance in a relationship now. Connecting with others can lead to attractive opportunities, and creative efforts are particularly successful. This is a good time to inject some whimsy and imagination, and possibly compassion, into a relationship, as well as attract others to you. While this is a good time to enjoy artistic and creative pursuits as an observer, it's even better for participating, making, creating, and turning imagination into reality. Creative movement can be healing, and so can making connections or reaching out compassionately. You are more giving with your time and energy.

This is a strong day for bringing a strong dose of intuition to your practical affairs, dear Capricorn. Even so, it's time to slow down long enough to contemplate recent events and your own feelings. If you've been working hard or experiencing rapid changes in your life, this is a time for more relaxation and rest. Assimilate, disengage, and process. You can have romantic feelings about the past now, and a philanthropic or creative activity can be especially useful for letting your gentler, contemplative side out. Intuitive insights into health or recent work projects can be helpful and right on mark. There is a strong focus on work, health, and routines these days, and today, you can feel quite inspired. You may be bringing more imagination, creativity, and generosity to the work you do or the services you provide. Your motivation to do something meaningful is very strong. Your dedication to others, family, a health program, or your work can feel especially strong and boost your spirits. Your personal or private life is rich at this time.

Today's transits encourage you to relax, accept, and process, dear Aquarius, and it can be refreshing. They can also inspire you to express yourself warmly. In fact, you may be getting your message across very creatively, or you may be generating quite a bit of interest in your work, mind, or projects. The feedback is good! You might benefit from word of mouth, and you can be especially successful at promotional or marketing work. You are not only finding it easier to access your imagination these days, but you are also more courageous about expressing it with others. You may be gradually sharing more and more of your creative side with the world, and as you do, you're building your confidence. This is a time of creative or emotional inspiration, and you can be quite fascinated by a topic or project, and happy about your personal interests, hobbies, pastimes, and entertainment.

Today's transits support your faith and vision, dear Pisces, making it natural to relax and go with the flow. This can be a fabulous time to focus on activities that produce non-material rewards. However, it can also be a fine day for tapping into your intuition and coming up with solutions that benefit your finances, family, home life, and sense of security or safety. Problem-solving is enhanced, particularly concerning financial, home, and practical or mechanical matters. Sharing ideas or plans with family might be especially rewarding now. You have subtle yet important opportunities to enhance your family experiences and find peace with your past. Money or resources for improving family life or for the home may be available now. You could find that a "going with the flow" approach to the day helps reduce recent stress, and that more colorful entertainment or activities that engage your imagination are both attractive right now and helpful.
